HeroHeader.WhatIDo: Building modern web and desktop applications for growing businesses.

ApplicationDevelopment.Title: Custom Application Development
ApplicationDevelopment.Description: Build secure, scalable web and desktop applications tailored to your business requirements, from planning to deployment.

UserInterfaceDesign.Title: Interfaces Users Enjoy Using
UserInterfaceDesign.Description: Design intuitive interfaces that make your product easier to use and increase user engagement.

BackendDevelopment.Title: Reliable Backend Systems
BackendDevelopment.Description: Develop secure backend systems and APIs that keep your application reliable, scalable, and easy to maintain.

OptimizationConsulting.Title: Make Your Product Faster
OptimizationConsulting.Description: Improve your application's speed, security, architecture, and overall performance.

Services.Solutions: From the initial idea to a ready-to-use product
Services.HowCanIHelpYou: Every project is different. I help you choose the right solution and deliver your product from design to deployment.

Medad.Title: Medad System
Medad.Description: A complete platform for school management with advanced features for attendance, reporting, student and teacher management, informing parents of their child's presence and absence at school with an SMS panel. The ability to communicate seamlessly between personnel in the system in an integrated manner to provide information and reduce costs.
Medad.ImageAlt: تصویر مدیریت کلاس در سامانه مداد

SingoLearn.Title: Singo Learn
SingoLearn.Description: Programming education website, ability to create courses, create chapters for courses, and manage teachers and students through the admin panel. Each student and teacher has a management dashboard built in, depending on their role.
SingoLearn.ImageAlt: تصویر صفحه اصلی وبسایت سینگو لرن

RestaurantPro.Title: Restaurant Management System
RestaurantPro.Description: A cloud-based multi-branch restaurant management platform designed to centralize branch operations, user management, inventory, orders, sales, and financial reporting. The system provides role-based access for administrators, branch managers, and cashiers while offering analytical dashboards, cloud synchronization, POS integration, and streamlined workflows for enterprise restaurant chains.
RestaurantPro.ImageAlt: Dashboard of a multi-branch restaurant management system

Tashim.Title: Tashim | Project Costing ERP
Tashim.Description: An enterprise ERP solution for project financial management and cost accounting, designed to calculate project cost, profitability, and financial performance. The platform supports project and contract management, cost centers, timesheets, budgeting, accounts receivable, and intelligent overhead allocation while providing executive dashboards and analytical reports for data-driven decision making.
Tashim.ImageAlt: Dashboard of a Project Costing ERP system
